betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oMobs marked by swords are Hunter Mobs. 

Some Hunter Mobs have level requirements to be attacked.  If the swords are red, your level is too low, and you will be told a level requirement when trying to attack them. 

If they're green you can use them to level up. 
Savannahs are a good place to start levelling, and so are Recursive Papers!

Additionally, certain swords give Hunter XP regardless of the mob. They are listed in the following quests.

§fHere's a possible hint, violence is directly bound to this magic. Almost as if someone or something wanted us to fight each other till someone 'wins'. This definitely does not feel like a law of nature, meaning that it may be mythic in origin.
Still, I will need more information to say for sure.
